---
title: "RepNote Email Drafts"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(commonmark)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r load-data}
msgs        <- read_csv("data/msgs.csv")
emails      <- read_csv("emails_authors.csv")
flora_raw   <- read_csv("data/flora.csv")

titles <- flora_raw %>%
  select(doi_o, title_o) %>%
  distinct(doi_o, .keep_all = TRUE)

deadline <- format(Sys.Date() + 15, "%d %B %Y")
```

```{r generate-emails}
combined <- msgs %>%
  left_join(titles, by = "doi_o") %>%
  left_join(
    emails %>%
      filter(!is.na(emails)) %>%
      group_by(doi) %>%
      summarise(email_addresses = paste(unique(emails), collapse = "; "), .groups = "drop"),
    by = c("doi_o" = "doi")
  )

make_email_html <- function(title, message_md, email_addresses, deadline) {
  message_md_fixed <- stringr::str_replace_all(message_md, "\n(> )", "  \n\\1")
  message_html <- commonmark::markdown_html(message_md_fixed)

  to_lines <- paste(
    htmltools::htmlEscape(stringr::str_split(email_addresses, "; ")[[1]]),
    collapse = "<br>"
  )

  paste0('
<html><body style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 700px;">

<p style="background:#f0f4ff; padding:10px; border-radius:4px; font-size:13px; border-left:4px solid #4a6fa5;">
<strong>To:</strong><br>', to_lines, '<br><br>
<strong>Subject:</strong> Your work and a replication/reproduction — upcoming PubPeer comment
</p>

<p>Hello,</p>

<p>We are getting in contact to let you know that a public link between your work
<strong>', htmltools::htmlEscape(title), '</strong>
and a replication or reproduction will be posted soon. To improve the transparency
of the literature, we are implementing a tool for reporting replications and
reproductions as comments on PubPeer.</p>

<p>PubPeer is currently the most accessible platform to make the connection between
research outputs visible to everyone. The articles have been coded as part of the
FORRT Library of Reproduction and Replication Attempts (FLoRA).</p>

<hr>
', message_html, '
<hr>

<p>Please let us know if you have comments, feedback or if you think the information
in the comment is incorrect before <strong>', deadline, '</strong>.
You can do so by replying to this email or anonymously through
<a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdLePtIlPxwiKQuEZv-LIsgn77oMRlFdEwyAoKm0F1qRwaRCA/viewform?usp=publish-editor">this form</a>.
You can find further information on the
<a href="https://forrt.org/flora-pubpeer/">RepNote project</a> website and the
<a href="https://forrt.org/replication-hub/">FORRT Replication Hub</a>, which
includes additional tools to discover replications.</p>

<p>Sincerely,</p>

<p>
The RepNote Team<br>
Dr Lukas Wallrich, Birkbeck, University of London<br>
Dr Lukas Röseler, Münster Center for Open Science, University of Münster<br>
Dr Josefina Weinerova, Birkbeck, University of London<br>
Dr Ze Freeman, University of Bern<br>
Dr Prasad Chandrashekar
</p>

</body></html>')
}

set.seed(42)
available_dois <- combined %>% filter(!is.na(email_addresses)) %>%
  distinct(doi_o) %>%
  pull(doi_o)
random_dois <- sample(available_dois, min(100, length(available_dois)))

email_drafts <- combined %>%
  distinct(doi_o, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(email_addresses), doi_o %in% random_dois) %>%
  mutate(
    html = pmap_chr(
      list(title_o, message, email_addresses, deadline),
      \(t, m, e, d) make_email_html(t, m, e, d)
    )
  )

nrow(email_drafts)
```

```{r save-html}
n_drafts <- nrow(email_drafts)

nav_script <- '
<script>
var current = 0;
var emails = document.querySelectorAll(".email-block");
function show(i) {
  emails.forEach(function(e) { e.style.display = "none"; });
  emails[i].style.display = "block";
  document.getElementById("counter").innerText = (i+1) + " of " + emails.length;
  current = i;
}
function next() { if (current < emails.length-1) show(current+1); }
function prev() { if (current > 0) show(current-1); }
window.onload = function() { show(0); };
</script>'

nav_bar <- '
<div style="position:sticky;top:0;background:#fff;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;z-index:99;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
  <button onclick="prev()">&#8592; Previous</button>
  <span id="counter"></span>
  <button onclick="next()">Next &#8594;</button>
</div>'

blocks <- map_chr(seq_len(n_drafts), \(i) {
  paste0(
    '<div class="email-block" style="padding:20px;">',
    email_drafts$html[i],
    '</div>'
  )
})

writeLines(
  paste0(
    '<html><head>', nav_script, '</head><body style="font-family:Arial;max-width:800px;margin:auto;">',
    nav_bar,
    paste(blocks, collapse = "\n"),
    '</body></html>'
  ),
  "data/email_drafts.html"
)

message("Saved ", n_drafts, " email drafts to data/email_drafts.html")
```

```{r preview}
browseURL("data/email_drafts.html")
```
